name: alpha_701_quality_value_reversal_combo
expr: add(multiply(0.52, rank(add(add(multiply(0.30, return_equity), multiply(0.24, return_on_assets)), add(multiply(0.22, gross_profit_assets), multiply(0.24, fcf_assets))))), multiply(0.48, rank(reverse(ts_mean(returns, 7)))))

name: alpha_702_efficiency_margin_short_rebound
expr: add(multiply(0.58, rank(add(add(multiply(0.34, gross_margin), multiply(0.28, asset_turnover)), add(multiply(0.20, gross_profit_assets), multiply(0.18, return_on_assets))))), multiply(0.42, rank(reverse(ts_mean(returns, 12)))))

name: alpha_703_quality_improvement_contra
expr: add(multiply(0.57, rank(add(add(multiply(0.32, ts_av_diff(return_equity, 63)), multiply(0.28, ts_av_diff(fcf_assets, 63))), add(multiply(0.22, gross_profit_assets), multiply(0.18, asset_turnover))))), multiply(0.43, rank(reverse(ts_mean(returns, 9)))))

name: alpha_704_stable_profitability_reversal
expr: add(multiply(0.60, rank(add(add(multiply(0.26, reverse(ts_std_dev(return_equity, 126))), multiply(0.24, reverse(ts_std_dev(return_on_assets, 126)))), add(multiply(0.28, gross_profit_assets), multiply(0.22, gross_margin))))), multiply(0.40, rank(reverse(ts_mean(returns, 6)))))

name: alpha_705_dual_horizon_reversal_quality

name: alpha_706_conditional_lowvol_quality_rebound
expr: trade_when(rank(reverse(ts_std_dev(returns, 20))) > 0.45, add(multiply(0.62, rank(add(add(multiply(0.34, fcf_assets), multiply(0.24, gross_margin)), add(multiply(0.22, return_on_assets), multiply(0.20, gross_profit_assets))))), multiply(0.38, rank(reverse(ts_mean(returns, 8))))), -1)

name: alpha_707_quality_acceleration_meanrev
expr: add(multiply(0.56, rank(add(add(multiply(0.30, ts_av_diff(return_on_assets, 126)), multiply(0.26, ts_av_diff(asset_turnover, 126))), add(multiply(0.24, gross_margin), multiply(0.20, gross_profit_assets))))), multiply(0.44, rank(reverse(ts_mean(returns, 10)))))

name: alpha_708_quality_minus_crowding_reversal
expr: add(multiply(0.50, rank(add(add(multiply(0.26, return_equity), multiply(0.22, fcf_assets)), add(multiply(0.18, gross_profit_assets), multiply(0.14, gross_margin))))), add(multiply(0.34, rank(reverse(ts_mean(returns, 7)))), multiply(0.16, rank(reverse(ts_mean(volume, 20))))))
